meaning: n.白杨adj.白杨的,类似白杨的,颤抖的
examples: Many U.S. cities now have nonstop flights to Aspen.
My son went to Aspen, in Colorado. Now he and his wife are people who love a quiet holiday.
"My God, what an idea!" Greene said at a recent gathering at the Aspen Institute.
Aspen will release its first quarter 2013 results on April 24, 2013, after market close.
In tony, stuffy Aspen, where he owns a home, he's just another affluent vacationer.
